stemHtml: ATC: "Globe Air 321 cleared to Barcelona, flight plan route, FL280, squawk 5233." Correct readback?

options.a: "Cleared flight plan route to Barcelona, FL280, Globe Air 321."
options.b: "Cleared to Barcelona, flight plan route, FL280, squawk 5233, Globe Air 321."
options.c: "Globe Air 321 cleared to Barcelona as filed. Climb to FL280, squawk 5233."
options.d: "Globe Air 321 cleared flight plan route, FL280, squawk 5233."
